title: Doman Beruss (disambiguation)
content:
'''Doman Beruss''' was the name of two related [[Senator/Legends|Senators]]:
*The male Senator Doman Beruss of [[Illodia]], see [[Doman Beruss (Illodian)]].
*The female Senator Doman Beruss of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], see [[Doman Beruss (Corellian)]].
*Both of them were named after [[Doman Beruss (elder)|Doman Beruss]], their ancestor.

{{Disambig}}
